executives.name: Xiang Li
executives.background: Mr. Xiang Li is our founder and has served as our chairman of the board of directors and chief executive officer since our inception. Mr. Li is a serial entrepreneur with approximately 20 years of experience in creating and managing internet companies in China. Prior to founding our company, Mr. Li founded autohome.com.cn, or Autohome (NYSE: ATHM), and served as its president from 1999 to June 2015.

executives.name: Tie Li
executives.background: Mr. Tie Li has served as our director since July 2016 and our chief financial officer since May 2016. Prior to joining our company, Mr. Li served as a vice president of Autohome from September 2014 to March 2016. Prior to that, Mr. Li worked at Autohome as its financial director from 2008 to 2014. From 2002 to 2008, Mr. Li worked at PricewaterhouseCoopers Zhong Tian LLP.

executives.name: Donghui Ma
executives.background: Mr. Donghui Ma has served as our director since October 2022 and our president since January 2023. Mr. Ma served as our chief engineer from September 2015 to December 2022. Prior to joining our company, Mr. Ma served as a dean of the research institute of SANY Heavy Vehicle Body Co., Ltd. from 2011 to 2015. Prior to that, Mr. Ma worked at IAT Automobile Technology Co., Ltd. and JMC (Jiangling Motors Co., Ltd.).

executives.name: Yan Xie
executives.background: Mr. Yan Xie has served as our chief technology officer since December 2022. Prior to joining our company, Mr. Xie served as a vice president of software engineering at Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd. and the chief architect of its Harmony OS. Prior to that, Mr. Xie worked at Intel and Baidu.

board_of_directors.name: Xiang Li
board_of_directors.background: Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Li Auto. Previously founded Autohome.

board_of_directors.name: Tie Li
board_of_directors.background: CFO of Li Auto. Former VP of Autohome and auditor at PwC.

board_of_directors.name: Donghui Ma
board_of_directors.background: President of Li Auto. Former Chief Engineer and research dean at SANY Heavy Vehicle Body.

board_of_directors.name: Xing Wang
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Xing Wang has served as our director since July 2019. Mr. Wang is the co-founder, an executive director, the chairman of the board of directors and the chief executive officer of Meituan (HKEX: 3690). Mr. Wang is responsible for the overall strategic planning, business direction and management of Meituan.

board_of_directors.name: Zheng Fan
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Zheng Fan has served as our independent director since October 2020. Mr. Fan served as a co-founder and vice president of Autohome from 1999 to 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Hongqiang Zhao
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hongqiang Zhao has served as our independent director since July 2020. Mr. Zhao serves as an executive director and the chief financial officer of Bairong Inc. (HKEX: 6608). Mr. Zhao also serves as an independent non-executive director of GDS Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: GDS; HKEX: 9698).

board_of_directors.name: Zhenyu Jiang
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Zhenyu Jiang has served as our independent director since January 2021. Mr. Jiang has served as the chief financial officer of Kebotix, Inc. since July 2021. Prior to that, he served as the chief financial officer of Cheetah Mobile Inc. (NYSE: CMCM) from 2017 to 2020.

sources.source_description: Annual Report Pursuant to Section 13 or 15(d) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (Form 20-F)
